candidates.name: Email Warmup Campaign Tracker
candidates.pitch: Connects to warmup provider APIs (if available) or scrapes dashboard pages to surface daily warmup stats (inbox placement, reply rate) directly in Gmail. Consolidates fragmented warmup data into one v
candidates.pain: Salespeople using email warmup services lose visibility into campaign progress and deliverability signals.

candidates.name: LinkedIn Company Tech Stack Scanner
candidates.pitch: Scrapes LinkedIn company pages and job listings to extract technology mentions, enriching CRM records automatically. Lightweight DOM parsing—no backend needed. Surfaces before-meeting intel in a sidep
candidates.pain: Sales reps waste hours manually researching prospect technology stacks before calls.

candidates.name: Sales Prospect Website Change Monitor
candidates.pitch: Takes periodic lightweight screenshots or DOM diffs of prospect URLs and alerts on changes. Stores diffs locally; alerts via browser notification. Targets small sales teams lacking full competitor int
candidates.pain: AEs miss critical website changes on prospects that signal buying intent.

candidates.name: PR Review Fatigue Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Analyzes GitHub PR diff size, complexity, and comment density to flag 'review overload' risk. Suggests splitting or scheduling reviews. Trivial Chrome extension with GitHub API calls and local scoring
candidates.pain: Senior engineers avoid reviewing large PRs due to fatigue, slowing team velocity.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GraphQL Query Complexity Analyzer
candidates.pitch: Intercepts GraphQL requests, estimates query complexity (depth + breadth scoring), and shows a cost badge per request. Flags expensive operations before they hit production. Integrates with Apollo and
candidates.pain: GraphQL APIs get hammered by deeply nested queries that are hard to cost-profile in development.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Notion Database Schema Viewer
candidates.pitch: Parses Notion page DOM to extract database schema (properties, types, relations) and renders a clean sidepanel map. Uses Notion's undocumented DOM structure—no API key needed for read-only views.
candidates.pain: Teams lose track of Notion database properties across pages, causing schema drift and broken automations.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Meeting Engagement Sentiment Tracker
candidates.pitch: Analyzes Google Meet participant video/mic activity patterns and chat message sentiment (simple keyword scoring) during calls to generate an 'engagement pulse' score. Writes summary to a Google Sheet
candidates.pain: Sales managers lack real-time signals on meeting engagement without reviewing full recordings.

candidates.name: Lead Scoring Territory Heatmap
candidates.pitch: Parses CRM lead data (location, industry, company size) and renders a territory heatmap in a sidepanel overlay on the CRM page. Suggests reassignments based on balanced territory coverage. Works with
candidates.pain: Sales managers assign leads by gut feel instead of geographic or firmographic clustering.
